## Meeting Purpose

[Screening Genevieve Michaels for the Managing Editor role.](https://fathom.video/share/7MwXrRCXHcYWWumzKnVeMMxq-zoQkz6t?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Role is Pipeline Architect, Not Writer:** The ME's core function is improving the "Atlas" AI pipeline by translating human editorial insights into repeatable, scalable instructions for engineering.](https://fathom.video/share/7MwXrRCXHcYWWumzKnVeMMxq-zoQkz6t?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)
  - [**Quality Framework:** Content must solve a reader's problem *and* drive a business action. The "good enough" threshold is met when these two goals are achieved.](https://fathom.video/share/7MwXrRCXHcYWWumzKnVeMMxq-zoQkz6t?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
  - [**Process Improvement Examples:** Michaels cited two examples of improving editorial workflows:](https://fathom.video/share/7MwXrRCXHcYWWumzKnVeMMxq-zoQkz6t?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
      - [**Atlassian:** Directed product marketing to focus only on product accuracy, preventing them from re-editing the entire piece and saving time.](https://fathom.video/share/7MwXrRCXHcYWWumzKnVeMMxq-zoQkz6t?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)
      - [**Verbatim Labs:** Delayed writing supporting copy until the final asset was approved, eliminating rework.](https://fathom.video/share/7MwXrRCXHcYWWumzKnVeMMxq-zoQkz6t?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
  - [**AI Tooling Experience:** Michaels uses AI for practical tasks like summarizing interview transcripts (Rev) and generating initial drafts from notes (ChatGPT), always refining the output.](https://fathom.video/share/7MwXrRCXHcYWWumzKnVeMMxq-zoQkz6t?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)

## Topics

### The Managing Editor Role: Pipeline Architect

  - [The ME role is primarily analytical, focused on improving the "Atlas" AI content pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/7MwXrRCXHcYWWumzKnVeMMxq-zoQkz6t?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)
  - [**Core Function:** Translate human editorial insights into repeatable, scalable instructions for engineering.](https://fathom.video/share/7MwXrRCXHcYWWumzKnVeMMxq-zoQkz6t?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)
      - [**Why:** This process builds leverage, enabling high-volume, high-quality content delivery without overworking the team.](https://fathom.video/share/7MwXrRCXHcYWWumzKnVeMMxq-zoQkz6t?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)
  - [**Daily Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/7MwXrRCXHcYWWumzKnVeMMxq-zoQkz6t?tab=summary&timestamp=1874.0)
    1.  [Run content tasks through Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/7MwXrRCXHcYWWumzKnVeMMxq-zoQkz6t?tab=summary&timestamp=1874.0)
    2.  [Observe outputs at each pipeline stage.](https://fathom.video/share/7MwXrRCXHcYWWumzKnVeMMxq-zoQkz6t?tab=summary&timestamp=1874.0)
    3.  [Edit the content to meet client goals.](https://fathom.video/share/7MwXrRCXHcYWWumzKnVeMMxq-zoQkz6t?tab=summary&timestamp=1874.0)
    4.  [Identify patterns in edits → articulate as pipeline improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/7MwXrRCXHcYWWumzKnVeMMxq-zoQkz6t?tab=summary&timestamp=1874.0)
  - [**Collaboration:**](https://fathom.video/share/7MwXrRCXHcYWWumzKnVeMMxq-zoQkz6t?tab=summary&timestamp=2068.0)
      - [**Account Strategists:** Define client strategy and goals.](https://fathom.video/share/7MwXrRCXHcYWWumzKnVeMMxq-zoQkz6t?tab=summary&timestamp=2068.0)
      - [**Engineering:** Implement pipeline changes via tickets.](https://fathom.video/share/7MwXrRCXHcYWWumzKnVeMMxq-zoQkz6t?tab=summary&timestamp=2068.0)
  - [**Pipeline Output Quality:**](https://fathom.video/share/7MwXrRCXHcYWWumzKnVeMMxq-zoQkz6t?tab=summary&timestamp=2191.0)
      - [**Best Case:** 10–15 min post-processing + 5 min human edit.](https://fathom.video/share/7MwXrRCXHcYWWumzKnVeMMxq-zoQkz6t?tab=summary&timestamp=2191.0)
      - [**Worst Case:** 1.5 hours, often due to highly specific client requirements (e.g., a multi-reviewer workflow for a women's supplement client).](https://fathom.video/share/7MwXrRCXHcYWWumzKnVeMMxq-zoQkz6t?tab=summary&timestamp=2191.0)

### Candidate Background & Motivation

  - [**Experience:** \~5 years in B2B tech content, with a career in professional writing.](https://fathom.video/share/7MwXrRCXHcYWWumzKnVeMMxq-zoQkz6t?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
  - [**Motivation:** Drawn to the role's analytical nature and the opportunity to build content architecture, not just edit documents.](https://fathom.video/share/7MwXrRCXHcYWWumzKnVeMMxq-zoQkz6t?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)
  - [**GrowthX Familiarity:** Has freelanced for GrowthX, writing 3 case studies and an article for the internal publication, *The Field Guide to GEO*.](https://fathom.video/share/7MwXrRCXHcYWWumzKnVeMMxq-zoQkz6t?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)

### Content Quality Framework

  - [**Primary Criteria:**](https://fathom.video/share/7MwXrRCXHcYWWumzKnVeMMxq-zoQkz6t?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
    1.  [**Reader Value:** Solves a problem or provides useful information for the target ICP.](https://fathom.video/share/7MwXrRCXHcYWWumzKnVeMMxq-zoQkz6t?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
    2.  [**Business Action:** Moves the reader along the buyer journey.](https://fathom.video/share/7MwXrRCXHcYWWumzKnVeMMxq-zoQkz6t?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
  - [**Secondary Criteria:**](https://fathom.video/share/7MwXrRCXHcYWWumzKnVeMMxq-zoQkz6t?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
      - [Concise, easy-to-understand communication.](https://fathom.video/share/7MwXrRCXHcYWWumzKnVeMMxq-zoQkz6t?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
      - [Accurate information.](https://fathom.video/share/7MwXrRCXHcYWWumzKnVeMMxq-zoQkz6t?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [Logical structure and flow.](https://fathom.video/share/7MwXrRCXHcYWWumzKnVeMMxq-zoQkz6t?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [**"Good Enough" Threshold:** Met when both the reader value and business action goals are achieved.](https://fathom.video/share/7MwXrRCXHcYWWumzKnVeMMxq-zoQkz6t?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)

### Practical AI Tooling Experience

  - [**Interview Processing (Rev):**](https://fathom.video/share/7MwXrRCXHcYWWumzKnVeMMxq-zoQkz6t?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)
      - [Uses AI for transcription, summarization, and chat-style search.](https://fathom.video/share/7MwXrRCXHcYWWumzKnVeMMxq-zoQkz6t?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)
      - [**Benefit:** Saves significant time by providing key themes and enabling quick information retrieval.](https://fathom.video/share/7MwXrRCXHcYWWumzKnVeMMxq-zoQkz6t?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
  - [**Drafting & Iteration (ChatGPT/Rovo):**](https://fathom.video/share/7MwXrRCXHcYWWumzKnVeMMxq-zoQkz6t?tab=summary&timestamp=1482.0)
      - [Uses ChatGPT for personal work; Atlassian's internal tool, Rovo, for client data.](https://fathom.video/share/7MwXrRCXHcYWWumzKnVeMMxq-zoQkz6t?tab=summary&timestamp=1482.0)
      - [**Benefit:** Generates initial drafts from notes, skipping the blank-page stage.](https://fathom.video/share/7MwXrRCXHcYWWumzKnVeMMxq-zoQkz6t?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)
      - [**Approach:** Always refines AI output; never uses it verbatim.](https://fathom.video/share/7MwXrRCXHcYWWumzKnVeMMxq-zoQkz6t?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)

      - [Arrange interviews with 1–2 more team members.](https://fathom.video/share/7MwXrRCXHcYWWumzKnVeMMxq-zoQkz6t?tab=summary&timestamp=2393.0)
